name: Burt Podbere
bio: Burt Podbere has served as CrowdStrike's Chief Financial Officer since 2017. Like Mr. Kurtz, he received a multi-year PSU grant whose grant-date fair value is determined under a Monte-Carlo simulation tied to stock-price hurdles.

footnotes: Stock Awards reflect grant-date fair value of RSUs and PSUs under FASB ASC Topic 718 — an accounting figure, not realized pay. The maximum-performance value of FY25 PSU grants would be $13,650,124. Mr. Podbere's multi-year PSU award is valued via Monte-Carlo simulation.
Non-Equity Incentive reflects the cash bonus paid under the Corporate Incentive Plan (CIP) for fiscal 2025 performance.
All Other Compensation reflects standard supplementary benefits (life/disability insurance, executive health, 401(k) match).
Stock Awards reflect grant-date fair value under FASB ASC Topic 718 — an accounting figure, not realized pay.
